summary: Comprehensive testing of MPS Bee Shop Kiosk iteration 4 - all 28 backend API tests passed, all new features working correctly. Students now read directly from welltrack_db (falls back to local beeshopkiosk_db.students for CSV imports). Skip tracking moved to dedicated skipped_students collection. 'Sync from WellTrack' button correctly removed from admin panel.

backend_api: GET /api/auth/google/login returns valid Google OAuth URL
GET /api/items returns list of shop items
DELETE /api/items/{name} deletes item and verifies removal
GET /api/sessions returns list of sessions with date field
POST /api/sessions creates and activates new session
DELETE /api/sessions/{label} deletes session AND cleans up skipped_students (NEW)
GET /api/students returns students (welltrack_db first, fallback to local)
POST /api/students/skip creates skip record in skipped_students collection (NEW)
GET /api/transactions/used includes both transactions AND skipped students (NEW)
POST /api/students/import works for CSV import fallback
GET /api/report/balances returns cumulative balance data per student
Sessions have date field for filtering
frontend_ui: Login page renders with Google Sign-In button
Step 1: Class selection with big buttons showing remaining count
Step 2: Student selection shows initials avatar and student name
Step 3: Numpad with +5/+10 buttons, Set Tokens button
Step 4: Shop view with items by category, cart panel, Save Transaction button
Admin Overview: Stats cards, charts, class breakdown, item rankings, token balances table
Admin Students: Student list displays correctly, Import CSV button visible
Admin Students: 'Sync from WellTrack' button CORRECTLY REMOVED (NEW)
Admin Items: Add item form, item list with edit/delete
Admin Sessions: Session list with date filter, New Session button, Activate/Delete buttons

seed_data_creation: Created test session in MongoDB for authenticated UI testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features working: (1) Students API reads from welltrack_db first, falls back to local beeshopkiosk_db.students for CSV imports, (2) POST /api/students/skip creates records in skipped_students collection, (3) GET /api/transactions/used includes both transactions and skipped students, (4) DELETE /api/sessions/{label} cleans up skipped_students for that session, (5) 'Sync from WellTrack' button removed from admin Students tab. Google OAuth cannot be fully tested end-to-end (requires real Google interaction).
test_credentials: Simulated auth via MongoDB session insertion: db.admin_sessions.insertOne({session_token:'test_playwright_session', email:'test@test.com', name:'Test Teacher', picture:'', role:'admin', expires_at:'2027-01-01T00:00:00+00:00', created_at:'2026-03-30T00:00:00+00:00'})
